context.projectOverview: Phase 6 — The Medical Team. Fixed SOP with CODE-ENFORCED safety. This sprint (S3) adds Gate 2: a deterministic red-flag emergency short-circuit that makes ZERO LLM/numerics/retrieval calls and returns a canned 911/988 escalation.

completedSprints.title: Pipeline plumbing + medical team
completedSprints.summary: 60215d2 — medical-sop engine name + selector switches + src/medical/{types,engine,team}.ts; built-in medical team.

completedSprints.title: Consent gate + audit + disclaimer (Gate 1)
completedSprints.summary: 4e0286d — ConsentGate (fail-closed Gate 1), AuditLog (append-only mode-0600 IDs/enums-only), DisclaimerComposer; MedicalSopDeps DI seam {auditLog,consentGate,disclaimer} + preserved zero-arg constructor; AuditEntry has optional patternsetVersion reserved for red-flag.

criticalConstraints: RedFlagDetector.detect(prompt) MUST be PURE and SYNCHRONOUS: identical input => identical output, no network, no model, no clock. Categories: cardiac|stroke|anaphylaxis|self-harm|overdose|none + patternsetVersion.

GuardrailSet.evaluate(prompt, ctx) returns allow | short-circuit{rule,cannedResponse} | refuse{rule,reason} with rulesetVersion; THROWS on an empty prompt. Replace the S1 trivial allow-only impl (team.ts buildMedicalGuardrails) with the real one (suggest src/medical/guardrails.ts + src/medical/red-flag.ts).

Wire Gate 2 into MedicalSopEngine.run IMMEDIATELY AFTER the consent gate. A red-flag match returns a canned 911/988 escalation MedicalAnswer (shortCircuit:true) with ZERO downstream calls (no numerics, no retrieval, no LLM) and appends an audit entry carrying ruleId + rulesetVersion + patternsetVersion (IDs/enums ONLY — no prompt text, no health values).

CARRY-FORWARD FIX (REQUIRED, from S2 eval): extend MedicalSopDeps with an injectable llmClient slot typed as LLMClient (from src/providers/types.ts) so the spy-LLMClient-never-invoked proof is REAL, not hollow. AC1 requires a spy/fake LLMClient asserted never invoked on a short-circuit. Inject the spy in the test and assert it was never called. Also keep a numerics-spy seam if practical, but the LLMClient one is mandatory.

MedicalSopEngine MUST keep its zero-arg constructor (selector.ts:126 calls `new MedicalSopEngine()`). Add llmClient as an OPTIONAL dep with a safe real default; never make it a required constructor param.
Keep injecting opts.now in tests (the engine.ts wall-clock fallback stays for ad-hoc runs; do not regress determinism).
ESM/NodeNext .js extensions; strict TS; no SDK types outside src/providers/; tests use temp dirs (no fs mocks). Do NOT commit audit logs.
nonGoals: do NOT implement HealthDataStore/numerics (S4), ingestion (S5), egress/full SOP (S6), or retrieval (S7). Gate 2 + detector + real GuardrailSet + injection seam ONLY.
